tasks.label: check-sp-json-shape
args: $p = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'Power_BI_report_validation_credentials\pbi-service-principal.json'; if (-not (Test-Path $p)) { Write-Output 'exists=false'; exit 0 }; Write-Output 'exists=true'; try { $j = Get-Content $p -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output 'jsonValid=true'; Write-Output ('tenantIdPresent=' + [bool]($j.tenantId)); Write-Output ('clientIdPresent=' + [bool]($j.clientId)); Write-Output ('clientSecretPresent=' + [bool]($j.clientSecret)); } catch { Write-Output 'jsonValid=false'; }

tasks.label: check-node-install-dir
args: if exist "C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.exe" (echo FOUND) else (echo MISSING)

tasks.label: check-sp-json-node
args: const fs=require('fs'); const p=process.env.USERPROFILE+'\\Power_BI_report_validation_credentials\\pbi-service-principal.json'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.log('exists=false'); process.exit(0);} console.log('exists=true'); try{const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); console.log('jsonValid=true'); console.log('tenantIdPresent='+Boolean(j.tenantId)); console.log('clientIdPresent='+Boolean(j.clientId)); console.log('clientSecretPresent='+Boolean(j.clientSecret));}catch{console.log('jsonValid=false');}

tasks.label: check-sp-json-ps-safe
args: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'Power_BI_report_validation_credentials\pbi-service-principal.json'; if(!(Test-Path $p)){ 'exists=false'; exit 0 }; 'exists=true'; try{$j=Get-Content $p -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; 'jsonValid=true'; 'tenantIdPresent=' + [bool]$j.tenantId; 'clientIdPresent=' + [bool]$j.clientId; 'clientSecretPresent=' + [bool]$j.clientSecret } catch { 'jsonValid=false' }"

tasks.label: fix-npm-path-permanent
args: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$cur=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('Path','User'); if ($cur -notlike '*nodejs*') { [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('Path', $cur + ';C:\Program Files\nodejs', 'User'); Write-Host 'PATH updated' } else { Write-Host 'PATH already contains nodejs' }"

tasks.label: fix-log-message
args: C:\Progra~1\nodejs\node.exe -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='tests/helpers/cygnus.helpers.ts';const s=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const n=s.replace('\u00e2\u0080\u00b3 Navigating directly to CygnusIN_gantt_chart report...','\u23f3 Navigating to report: '+process.env.CYGNUS_REPORT_URL);if(s===n){console.log('NOT_FOUND');}else{fs.writeFileSync(f,n,'utf8');console.log('REPLACED');}"

tasks.label: inspect-user-machine-cygnus-env
args: $keys=@('CYGNUS_REPORT_URL','CYGNUS_WORKSPACE_URL','CYGNUS_DATASET_ID','CYGNUS_GROUP_ID','CYGNUS_REPORT_ID','PowerBIWorkspaceId','PowerBIReportId','PowerBIDatasetId','PowerBITenantId'); Write-Host '--- USER ---'; foreach($k in $keys){$v=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable($k,'User'); if($null -ne $v -and $v -ne ''){Write-Host ($k+'='+$v)}}; Write-Host '--- MACHINE ---'; foreach($k in $keys){$v=[Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable($k,'Machine'); if($null -ne $v -and $v -ne ''){Write-Host ($k+'='+$v)}}
